title: TakeTwo (TTWO) Introduces Imaginative Shooter-Skater Game

text: Take-Two is prepping for a huge fiscal year ahead. Losses are a sticking point for investors.

title: 3 Metaverse Stocks You'll Regret Not Buying Soon: November 2023
text: A “metaverse” is a virtual, interconnected, and dynamic space that allows real-world users to interact with a digital world with other users. Previously limited to the domain of science fiction, recent advances in technology have allowed companies to create their own metaverses—and earn from them.

title: Prime Time Picks: 3 Entertainment Stocks to Bet On Instead of AMC
text: While AMC Entertainment (NYSE: AMC ) stock was once the epitome of a strong entertainment stock thanks to “meme mania,” lately it has lost its appeal for investors. Looking ahead to 2024, you may be looking at alternative options for entertainment stocks.

title: ‘Grand Theft Auto' Hype Sends Take-Two Stock To 2023 High
text: Shares of the “Grand Theft Auto” maker are up 13% since the company said last week it will soon release a trailer for the series' sixth installment.

title: GTA 6 could push Take-Two Interactive stock to $175: Deutsche Bank
text: Take-Two Interactive Software Inc (NASDAQ: TTWO) is already up 50% year-to-date but a Deutsche Bank analyst is convinced the stock is not of juice just yet.

title: TTWO Stock Alert: Deutsche Bank Upgrades Take-Two Interactive
text: Take-Two Interactive (NASDAQ: TTWO ) stock is on the move Tuesday after the company's shares received an upgrade from Deutsche Bank analysts. Deutsche Bank's Benjamin Soff upgraded shares of TTWO stock from a “hold” rating to a “buy” rating today.

title: Analyst: Big Things Ahead for Take-Two Interactive Stock
text: Video game concern Take-Two Interactive Inc (NASDAQ:TTWO) is up 2.6% before the bell, after Deutsche Bank upgraded the stock to "buy" from "hold" and raised its price target by $20 to $175.

title: Take-Two Interactive: Strong Buy Thesis Intact, Fueled By GTA VI's Inflection
text: Take-Two Interactive stock has generated a 23% alpha against the S&P since January 2023. The release and success of GTA VI will be crucial for investor sentiment and TTWO's future credibility. The acquisition of Cfx and the potential monetization of mods offer growth opportunities for Rockstar Games.

title: Take-Two (TTWO) Q2 Loss Widens Y/Y, Ad Revenues Decline
text: Take-Two's (TTWO) second-quarter fiscal 2024 results suffer due to weak Game and Advertising revenues, and decreasing consumer spending.

title: Take-Two (TTWO) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Take-Two (TTWO) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Take-Two Interactive: A Buy Considering Q2 Performance And GTA VI Launch
text: The Q2 FY 2024 net bookings and adjusted bottom line for Take-Two surpassed the market's expectations. There is a good chance of Grand Theft Auto VI being introduced to gamers in the next fiscal year judging by recent news and comments made by company management. I continue to rate TTWO as a Buy, after analyzing the company's second-quarter results and assessing the possibility of the launch of Grand Theft Auto VI in FY 2025.

title: Grand Theft Auto V clears 190M in sales ahead of sequel announcement
text: Grand Theft Auto V maintains the crown with 190 million units sold as of the last fiscal quarter as its sequel is on the horizon.

title: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (TTWO) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (NASDAQ:TTWO ) Q2 2024 Earnings Conference Call November 8, 2023 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Nicole Shevins - Senior Vice President, Investor Relations and Corporate Communications Strauss Zelnick - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Karl Slatoff - President Lainie Goldstein - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Andrew Uerkwitz - Jefferies Eric Handler - ROTH MKM Doug Creutz - TD Cowen Andrew Marok - Raymond James Eric Sheridan - Goldman Sachs Drew Crum - Stifel Omar Dessouky - Bank of America Mike Hickey - Benchmark Clay Griffin - MoffettNathanson Brian Fitzgerald - Wells Fargo Operator Greetings and welcome to the Take-Two Interactive Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2024 Earnings Call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Grand Theft Auto VI trailer announcement, 2Q earnings beat drive Rockstar Games-parent stock higher
text: Take-Two Interactive Software Inc (NASDAQ:TTWO) reported fiscal second-quarter earnings that slightly topped expectations, but excitement over the announcement of Grand Theft Auto VI lifted the stock before its results were even announced.  Shares of the Rockstar Games parent climbed more than 2% in extended trading Wednesday after the company posted earnings of $1.22 a share on net bookings of $1.44 billion, compared to expectations of $1.03 per share on sales of $1.43 billion.

title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: New 'Grand Theft Auto' Game Lifts Take-Two Shares
text: The S&P 500 squeaked out a winning session, picking up 0.1%, to keep its now eight-day winning streak going. Overall, U.S. equities were little changed amid new concerns that the Fed may not be done raising interest rates to fight inflation.

title: Video Game Publisher Take-Two Surges On 'Grand Theft Auto' News
text: Video game publisher Take-Two Interactive Software beat expectations for its fiscal second quarter and announced a new “Grand Theft Auto” game.

text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (NASDAQ:TTWO) today reported results for the second quarter of its fiscal year 2024, ended September 30, 2023. text: Shares of Take-Two Interactive Software Inc. (NASDAQ: TTWO) jumped by as much as 9% in premarket trading Wednesday morning.

title: Why Is Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) Stock Up 8% Today?
text: Take-Two Interactive (NASDAQ: TTWO ) stock is getting a boost on Wednesday after video game developer Rockstar Games revealed plans for its 25th anniversary next month. According to a series of posts on X, the social media platform formerly known as Twitter, the company is going to show off a new trailer for the next Grand Theft Auto game to celebrate.

title: Take-Two stock up ahead of earnings on anticipation for GTA 6 announcement
text: Take-Two Interactive shares surged as much as 9.4% in pre-market trading Wednesday, on anticipation of a full announcement for its "Grand Theft Auto 6 game."

title: Take-Two stock soars premarket on GTA VI news: All-time high imminent?
text: In 2022, after two teenagers made a hack and leaked early footage of the highly-anticipated Grand Theft Auto VI (GTA VI) video game, the shares of the publisher, Take-Two Interactive (NASDAQ: TTWO), plunged as much as 6%.

title: Take-Two Stock Jumps After Report of Grand Theft Auto Reveal. Next, Earnings.

title: Take-Two Interactive shares surge on report of new Grand Theft Auto game as Robinhood stock drops on earnings miss
text: Upwork Inc.'s UPWK, +6.13% stock surged 21% as the company reported a big beat on earnings after losing money in the same quarter a year ago.

title: Take-Two Interactive shares rise on report Grand Theft Auto game to be announced this week
text: Shares of Take-Two Interactive Software TTWO, +1.48% rallied 9% in premarket trade as Bloomberg News reported that the next Grand Theft Auto game may be announced as early as this week. The report, citing people familiar with the plans, said a trailer for Grand Theft Auto VI will be published next month.

title: Take-Two (TTWO) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?

title: Analysts Estimate Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
